market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed near-term volatility due to positive GEX, but high risk of sharp downside acceleration if Weekly Gamma Flip breaks.
outlook.summary: The market exhibits a strong bearish structure characterized by extreme Put/Call ratios and persistent smirk volatility skews across all expirations. While positive GEX in 0DTE and Weekly expiries suggests Market Makers are long gamma and will actively suppress volatility around the 673-680 range, the underlying sentiment remains heavily skewed towards downside protection. Massive multi-expiry Call Walls at 675 and 380 strictly cap upward mobility, while a formidable Put Wall complex rests below at 655 and 650. The negative Monthly GEX indicates a latent volatility risk should the spot price descend into lower support territories.
